author: mark
text: Replace /bin/kill shell-out with libc::killpg(pgid, SIGKILL) in src/plugin/limits.rs. Root cause of CI hangs: the kill -KILL -{pid} form parses ambiguously, errors were swallowed by 'let _', and a failed kill let the shell's sleep 20 grandchild keep the stdout pipe open, deadlocking the reader threads. libc was already an indirect dep in Cargo.lock, so adding it as a direct dep is zero build cost. All 3 plugin_limits tests pass locally in 2.1s. 100% coverage maintained, clippy clean.
